response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of low-level hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical communication
Extensive experience with performance-critical systems and DevOps tooling
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling experience
Lacks exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Educational background (BS only) and career trajectory do not meet required seniority thresholds for principal-level hardware performance roles

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU optimization background
